name: Unstable SMP
description:
In the Unstable SMP lies 4 main characters telling their own tales. Each one creating a story with such lore, that it can never go unnoticed.

This bot allows the individual to write their own tale, as if they were the scriptwriter for the Unstable SMP. As if they were included in the story, writing their own lore that will be known to them.

This bot has details of major storyline events going on within Unstable, will add more details as the current Cindercrest/Null chapter continues.

Now, just like they created their stories, you can create yours. Sorry for the wait lovelies :)

^

Will add more when its not 3am and I have a functioning brain 😂
creator: NiceLofee
